cypher: MATCH (n:LogicNode {kind: 'function'}) WHERE n.name CONTAINS 'parse_file' RETURN n

nl: What functions exist in the codebase?
cypher: MATCH (n:LogicNode {kind: 'function'}) RETURN n.name AS name, n.module_path AS file LIMIT 20
expected_behavior: Returns list of function names and files

cypher: MATCH (n:LogicNode {kind: 'class'}) RETURN n.name AS name, n.module_path AS file
MATCH (f:LogicNode)-[:CALLS]->(g:LogicNode) WHERE f.name CONTAINS 'main' RETURN g.name AS callee, g.module_path AS file
MATCH (caller:LogicNode)-[:CALLS]->(target:LogicNode) WHERE target.name CONTAINS 'parse_file' RETURN caller.name AS caller, caller.module_path AS file
MATCH (a:LogicNode)-[:CALLS]->(b:LogicNode) WHERE a.module_path <> b.module_path RETURN a.name AS caller, a.module_path AS caller_file, b.name AS callee, b.module_path AS callee_file LIMIT 20
MATCH (n:LogicNode)-[r:CALLS]->() WITH n, count(r) AS calls WHERE calls > 3 RETURN n.name AS function_name, n.module_path AS file, calls ORDER BY calls DESC LIMIT 10
expected_behavior: Returns functions with many outgoing calls

cypher: MATCH (f:LogicNode)-[:MUTATES]->(v:Variable) WHERE f.name CONTAINS 'process_data' RETURN v.name AS variable, v.type_hint AS type
MATCH (f:LogicNode)-[:READS]->(v:Variable) WHERE v.name CONTAINS 'x' RETURN f.name AS reader, f.module_path AS file
expected_behavior: Returns functions that read the variable

cypher: MATCH (v:Variable)-[:PASSES_TO|FEEDS*1..5]->(target:Variable) WHERE v.name CONTAINS 'request_body' RETURN v.name AS source, target.name AS destination
expected_behavior: Returns data flow path for the variable

nl: Show the inheritance tree for Shape
cypher: MATCH path=(c:LogicNode {kind: 'class'})-[:INHERITS*]->(p:LogicNode) WHERE c.name CONTAINS 'Shape' RETURN [n IN nodes(path) | n.name] AS chain
MATCH (m:LogicNode)-[:MEMBER_OF]->(c:LogicNode {kind: 'class'}) WHERE c.name CONTAINS 'UserService' RETURN m.name AS method, m.kind AS kind, m.module_path AS file

nl: Find all functions in the parsing module
cypher: MATCH (n:LogicNode {kind: 'function'}) WHERE n.module_path CONTAINS 'parsing' RETURN n.name AS function_name, n.module_path AS file
expected_behavior: Returns functions in a specific module path

nl: What's the impact of changing save_record?
cypher: MATCH (f:LogicNode)-[:MUTATES]->(v:Variable)<-[:READS]-(consumer:LogicNode) WHERE f.name CONTAINS 'save_record' RETURN v.name AS variable, consumer.name AS affected_function
expected_behavior: Returns downstream consumers affected by mutation

nl: What functions accept an Event type?
cypher: MATCH (fn:LogicNode)-[:ACCEPTS]->(ts:TypeShape) WHERE ts.base_type CONTAINS 'Event' RETURN fn.name AS function_name, ts.kind AS shape_kind, ts.definition AS shape

nl: Find functions that produce a Response type
cypher: MATCH (fn:LogicNode)-[:PRODUCES]->(ts:TypeShape) WHERE ts.base_type CONTAINS 'Response' RETURN fn.name AS function_name, fn.module_path AS file, ts.definition AS shape
MATCH (f:Flow) RETURN f.name AS flow_name, f.description AS description

nl: What steps are in the import flow?
cypher: MATCH (n:LogicNode)-[:STEP_OF]->(f:Flow) WHERE f.name CONTAINS 'import' RETURN n.name AS step, n.kind AS kind, n.module_path AS file

nl: Find duplicate functions by AST hash
cypher: MATCH (n:LogicNode) WHERE n.status = 'active' WITH n.ast_hash AS hash, collect(n) AS nodes WHERE size(nodes) > 2 UNWIND nodes AS n RETURN n.name AS name, n.module_path AS file, n.ast_hash AS hash

nl: List all variables in a function
cypher: MATCH (fn:LogicNode)-[r]->(v:Variable) WHERE fn.name CONTAINS 'create_json' RETURN type(r) AS action, v.name AS variable, v.type_hint AS type, v.is_parameter AS is_param, v.origin_line AS line ORDER BY v.origin_line
expected_behavior: Returns all variables with their relationship type

cypher: MATCH (writer:LogicNode)-[:ASSIGNS]->(v:Variable)<-[:READS]-(reader:LogicNode) WHERE writer <> reader RETURN writer.name AS writer, v.name AS variable, reader.name AS reader LIMIT 10
MATCH (f:LogicNode {kind: 'function'})-[:ASSIGNS]->(v:Variable) RETURN f.name AS function_name, v.name AS variable LIMIT 10
MATCH (n:LogicNode)-[r]-(neighbor) WHERE n.name CONTAINS 'parse_file' RETURN n.name AS node, type(r) AS relationship, labels(neighbor)[0] AS neighbor_type, neighbor.name AS neighbor_name LIMIT 20
MATCH (fn:LogicNode)-[:MUTATES]->(v:Variable) RETURN DISTINCT fn.name AS function_name, fn.module_path AS file
MATCH (n:LogicNode {kind: 'module'}) RETURN n.name AS name, n.module_path AS path
